AppDescription: MQTT uplink monitor + pluggable payload decoders + tailored RadioBridge dashboards (charts + animations) + configuration/downlinks + cloud integrations. Import gateway JSON history on uplinks page.
AppVersionNotes: Always-forward MQTT using Uplinks page decoder with correct °C/°F handling; uplink cache + null/diagnostic spam filtering; improved MQTT broker reconnection. Added login flow (gateway-auth), per-sensor Radiobridge dashboards with animated status visuals (door/contact, movement, tilt, water, push button), and status.json exposing server host/port.
